serial_transfer_init.tooltip: Initialize SerialTransfer object with serial port and baud rate

serial_transfer_send_int.tooltip: Send an integer value via SerialTransfer

serial_transfer_send_float.tooltip: Send a float value via SerialTransfer

serial_transfer_available.tooltip: Check if SerialTransfer has received new valid data

serial_transfer_receive_int.tooltip: Receive an integer value from SerialTransfer

serial_transfer_receive_float.tooltip: Receive a float value from SerialTransfer

serial_transfer_receive_string.tooltip: Receive a string of specified length from SerialTransfer

serial_transfer_status.tooltip: Get SerialTransfer status code (2=new data, 1=no data, 0=CRC error)

serial_transfer_current_packet_id.tooltip: Get the packet ID of the most recently received packet

i2c_transfer_init_master.tooltip: Initialize I2CTransfer master object with I2C interface

i2c_transfer_init_slave.tooltip: Initialize I2CTransfer slave object with I2C interface and address

i2c_transfer_send_int.message0: I2CTransfer %1 send int %2 to address %3 packet ID %4
i2c_transfer_send_int.tooltip: Send an integer value to a specific I2C address

i2c_transfer_send_float.message0: I2CTransfer %1 send float %2 to address %3 packet ID %4
i2c_transfer_send_float.tooltip: Send a float value to a specific I2C address

i2c_transfer_send_string.message0: I2CTransfer %1 send string %2 to address %3 packet ID %4
i2c_transfer_send_string.tooltip: Send a string to a specific I2C address

i2c_transfer_receive_int.tooltip: Receive an integer value from I2C

i2c_transfer_receive_float.tooltip: Receive a float value from I2C

i2c_transfer_receive_string.tooltip: Receive a string of specified length from I2C

spi_transfer_init_master.tooltip: Initialize SPITransfer master object with SS pin

spi_transfer_init_slave.tooltip: Initialize SPITransfer slave object with SPI interrupt

spi_transfer_send_int.tooltip: Send an integer value via SPI

spi_transfer_send_float.tooltip: Send a float value via SPI

spi_transfer_available.tooltip: Check if SPITransfer has received new data via interrupt

spi_transfer_receive_int.tooltip: Receive an integer value from SPI

spi_transfer_receive_float.tooltip: Receive a float value from SPI

spi_transfer_receive_string.tooltip: Receive a string of specified length from SPI
